title: Is Tiger Woods the Best Golfer Ever?
prompt: Evaluate Tiger Woods's claim to being the greatest golfer of all time. Consider statistical records, major championship performance, era-adjusted comparisons, psychological dominance, career longevity, and what 'best ever' means across different frameworks.

agents.bio: Numbers-first golf analyst. Believes major wins, scoring averages, and adjusted strokes gained are the only defensible metrics for GOAT debates.
Golf historian who reveres Nicklaus's 18 majors, Hogan's ball-striking, and the pre-Tiger era. Skeptical that dominance in a weaker field proves greatness.
Sports science analyst who adjusts for era, equipment, field depth, and global talent pools. Believes context matters more than raw counts.
Former tour caddie turned commentator. Judges greatness by clutch performance, intimidation factor, and what other pros say behind closed doors.
Epistemologist of sport who questions what 'best ever' even means across eras. Challenges hidden assumptions in every GOAT framework.
